mapper.insert: insert into student_status(student_id, status, reason, operate_date, operator) values(#{studentId}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{operateDate}, #{operator})
mapper.select: select s.id, s.student_id as studentId, stu.name as studentName, s.status, s.reason, s.operate_date as operateDate, s.operator from student_status s left join student stu on s.student_id = stu.id where s.id = #{id}
select s.id, s.student_id as studentId, stu.name as studentName, s.status, s.reason, s.operate_date as operateDate, s.operator from student_status s left join student stu on s.student_id = stu.id

select s.id, s.student_id as studentId, stu.name as studentName, s.status, s.reason, s.operate_date as operateDate, s.operator from student_status s left join student stu on s.student_id = stu.id
and stu.name like concat('%', #{studentName}, '%')
and s.status = #{status}
and s.operator like concat('%', #{operator}, '%')
